# Victor Vanguard International (VVI)

> VVI is the international sourcing, supplier verification, and quality assurance company of the Dolor Group. Unlike marketplaces where suppliers self-register, VVI independently evaluates manufacturers through factory visits, business verification, product inspections, and quality assessments before recommending them to buyers.

This file follows the llms.txt convention to help AI researcher agents understand the site.

## About
- Legal name: Victor Vanguard International
- Parent group: Dolor Group (built on the procurement and retail experience of DVS Dolor Marketing, Daet, Camarines Norte, Philippines)
- Mission: Make international sourcing transparent, secure, and reliable through independent supplier verification and quality assurance.
- Vision: Become the trusted verification standard for global sourcing and international trade.
- Trust mark: "VVI Verified" - signifies independently verified manufacturers and consistent quality standards.

## Core services
- Factory Verification - physical factory visits, business registration verification, facility assessment, production capability review.
- Supplier Due Diligence - company background verification, export capability assessment, ownership validation, certification review.
- Product Verification - product inspection, specification validation, sample evaluation, packaging inspection.
- Quality Assurance - pre-shipment inspections, random inspections, quality reports, defect identification.
- Global Sourcing Support - supplier matching, procurement assistance, MOQ negotiation, manufacturing coordination.

## Key pages
- / : Home / landing page
- /sitemap.xml : Machine-readable list of public URLs
- /robots.txt : Crawler directives

## Structured data
Pages expose schema.org JSON-LD (Organization, WebSite). Product and ItemList schemas are added on catalog pages as they ship.

## Contact
- Email: contact@victorvanguard.com
- Presence: Shenzhen, Hong Kong, London, New York
